# ClickUp OSS — Product Overview

Welcome to ClickUp OSS, the ultimate open-source project management platform built for modern teams. Whether you're managing complex software development cycles, planning marketing campaigns, or tracking OKRs, ClickUp OSS brings all your work into one unified, high-performance workspace.

## 🌟 What is ClickUp OSS?

ClickUp OSS is a comprehensive, self-hosted project management tool designed to replace multiple disconnected apps. It provides:
- **Task Management**: Create, assign, and track tasks with custom statuses, fields, and dependencies.
- **Real-Time Collaboration**: Edit documents concurrently with your team, just like Google Docs.
- **AI Integration**: Leverage built-in AI to summarize threads, breakdown large tasks, and write meeting notes.
- **Powerful Views**: Visualize your work as Lists, Kanban Boards, Calendars, or Gantt charts.
- **Automations**: Set up "If This, Then That" rules to automate your repetitive workflows.

## 🚀 Key Value Propositions

### 1. Data Ownership & Security
By self-hosting ClickUp OSS, you retain 100% control over your data. No more worrying about third-party data breaches or vendor lock-in.

### 2. Extensibility
Built on a microservices architecture using Node.js and PostgreSQL, the platform is designed to be modified. Need a custom integration? Write a new service or use our robust Webhooks engine.

### 3. AI-First Approach
We didn't just bolt AI on; we built it into the core. ClickUp OSS uses state-of-the-art LLMs (Anthropic/OpenAI) to help you plan your day, write specifications, and extract action items from discussions automatically.

## 🎯 Core Features

- **Hierarchical Organization**: Workspaces → Spaces → Folders → Lists → Tasks. Keep everything organized, no matter the scale.
- **Customizable Workflows**: Don't adapt to our tool; adapt our tool to you. Define custom task types (Bugs, Features, Leads) and custom fields.
- **Time Tracking**: Built-in timesheets and billable hour tracking.
- **Goal Tracking**: Tie daily tasks to high-level company OKRs.

## 💻 Who is this for?

- **Engineering Teams**: Manage sprints, track bugs, and integrate with GitHub/GitLab.
- **Product Managers**: Write specs in collaborative Docs and link them directly to engineering tasks.
- **Agencies**: Manage client projects with dedicated Spaces and granular permissions.
- **Enterprise**: Deploy on Kubernetes, integrate with SSO/SAML, and maintain strict compliance.

Get started today and take control of your work!
